title: SENIOR MANAGER
description:
Canteen Manager – Roles & Responsibilities

Operations Management

  • Oversee daily canteen operations to ensure smooth and timely service

  • Plan and manage meal schedules according to operational requirements

  • Ensure proper opening, closing, and cash handling procedures

Food Quality & Hygiene

  • Ensure food quality, taste, and portion control are consistently maintained

  • Comply with NEA, SFA, and food hygiene standards

  • Ensure cleanliness of kitchen, serving areas, and dining spaces

Staff Supervision

  • Recruit, train, schedule, and supervise canteen staff

  • Monitor staff performance and attendance

  • Ensure adequate manpower during peak meal hours

Inventory & Procurement

  • Manage stock levels, raw materials, and consumables

  • Coordinate with suppliers for timely procurement

  • Control food wastage and operational costs

Customer & Client Coordination

  • Handle customer feedback and complaints professionally

  • Coordinate with clients (schools, factories, offices, dormitories, etc.)

  • Ensure service levels meet contractual requirements

Financial Control & Reporting

  • Monitor daily sales, expenses, and cost control

  • Prepare basic reports for management review

  • Ensure proper billing and POS usage (if applicable)

Health, Safety & Compliance

  • Ensure workplace safety and proper use of equipment

  • Maintain valid licenses, permits, and staff hygiene certifications

  • Ensure compliance with MOM and workplace safety regulations

Administration & Coordination

  • Maintain staff records, schedules, and duty rosters

  • Coordinate with management for operational improvements

  • Resolve daily operational issues efficiently

If you want, I can:

  • Shorten this for MOM job scope approval

  • Customize it for school / factory / dormitory canteen

  • Align it for S Pass / Work Permit justification

postedCompany.description:
Kavi Restaurant Indian Food in Singapore is a new stall that serves up delicious Indian cuisine. The restaurant is located in the heart of the city and is easily accessible by public transport. The restaurant has a warm and inviting atmosphere, with its traditional Indian decor and vibrant colors. The staff are friendly and attentive, and the menu is extensive, offering a wide variety of dishes from all over India.

The restaurant specializes in North Indian cuisine, with a focus on tandoori dishes. The tandoori dishes are cooked in a traditional clay oven, giving them a unique flavor and texture. The menu also includes a variety of curries, biryanis, and other Indian favorites. The restaurant also offers a selection of vegetarian dishes, as well as a variety of desserts.

The restaurant has a great selection of drinks, including Indian beers, wines, and spirits. The restaurant also offers a variety of cocktails and mocktails. The restaurant also has a great selection of Indian teas and coffees.

The restaurant is open for lunch and dinner, and the prices are reasonable. The restaurant also offers catering services for special occasions.

Overall, Kavi Restaurant Indian Food in Singapore is a great place to enjoy delicious Indian cuisine. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, the staff are friendly and attentive, and the menu is extensive. The restaurant is a great place to enjoy a meal with friends and family.
